arts.ttl: “Kvara? An Almost Mandatory Choice, He’s Now Part of the Past”: Manna Discusses Napoli’s Future
arts.sum: As Napoli prepare for a crucial match against Atalanta at the Gewiss Stadium, sporting director Giovanni Manna addressed the media about recent developments within the team, including the departure of star player Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. The match is significant for both teams, with Napoli looking to extend their lead at the top of the Serie A table and Atalanta aiming to close the gap. The post “Kvara? An Almost Mandatory Choice, He’s Now Part of the Past”: Manna Discusses Napoli’s Future appeared first on FootItalia.com.
